accessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID. When omitted, falls back to the AWS credential chain (AWS_PROFILE, IAM role, etc.).

secretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key. When omitted, falls back to the AWS credential chain (IAM role, etc.).

forcePathStyle.description: Use path-style URLs. Required for most S3-compatible storage.

prefix.description: Key prefix for all cache entries.

encryptionKey.description: Client-side AES-256-CBC encryption key. Encrypts artifacts before upload.

ssoProfile.description: AWS SSO profile name. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE env var when omitted.

disableChecksum.description: Disable AWS response checksum validation. Default: false.

serverSideEncryption.description: Enable S3 SSE-S3 server-side encryption. Ignored when encryptionKey is set. Default: false.
